subject: Resolution for Your Billing Issue
body:
Dear James Whitfield,

Thank you for reaching out regarding the duplicate charge on your account. I understand how frustrating this situation can be, especially after being a loyal customer for three years.

I am currently reviewing your billing details to confirm the duplicate charge and will initiate the refund process for you as soon as possible. 

As a next step, I will need to verify the specific charges on your account. Please allow me a moment to gather this information, and I will update you shortly.

If you have any further questions or concerns in the meantime, please feel free to reach out. I’m here to help!

Warm regards,

[Your Name]  
Customer Care Team
